mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_location (shop_id, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{name}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO stock_level (shop_id, variant_id, location_id, available, reserved, updated_at) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{variantId}, #{locationId}, #{available}, #{reserved}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO stock_reservation (shop_id, variant_id, location_id, quantity, status, expires_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{variantId}, #{locationId}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, shop_id, variant_id, location_id, quantity, status, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM stock_reservation WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND status = 'HELD' AND expires_at <= #{now} ORDER BY expires_at, id
